session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk/ and report all output including any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report all output.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci command from repo root

session.assistant:
## Summary
make fast-ci **FAILED** with exit code 2.
### Failures:
1. **Prettier formatting** - 11 files have code style issues: - docs/learned/architecture/typed-metadata-pattern.md - docs/learned/cli/script-flag-behavior.md - docs/learned/erk/erk-slots-package.md - docs/learned/erk/pool-config-decoupling.md - docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md - docs/learned/objectives/objective-reconciliation-workflow.md - docs/learned/planning/erk-learn-plan-dispatch.md - docs/learned/planning/multi-node-plans.md - docs/learned/pr-operations/feedback-classification-architecture.md - docs/learned/tui/graphite-url-handling.md - docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md
2. **Exec Reference Check** - FAILED - `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is out of date - Remediation: Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate
### Passed:
- AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - Lint (ruff): All checks passed - Format Check: 1740 files already formatted - Markdown Check: (no output/passed) - ty: All checks passed - Unit Tests (erk): 5858 passed in 27.65s - Tests (erk-dev): 138 passed in 5.92s - Tests (erk-statusline): 123 passed in 0.94s - Tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed (complete)
The main issues are the Prettier formatting violations in documentation files and the outdated exec reference documentation.
